title: Day 2 Challenge — Self Introduction
challengeTask: Record a 1-minute video or audio of yourself introducing yourself in English using at least 3 sentence patterns learned today (name, origin, profession, family, or hobbies).
hindiTask: अपने आप को English में introduce करते हुए 1-minute का video या audio record करें, जिसमें आज सीखे गए कम से कम 3 patterns (नाम, origin, profession, family, hobbies) शामिल हों।
successCriteria: Used at least 3 different introduction patterns
Spoke for at least 45 seconds without long pauses
No major grammar errors (like 'I am belongs to')
Clear pronunciation of key vocabulary words
bonusChallenge: Introduce yourself to a friend or family member in English today and note their reaction.
